column1: Hey tyler, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! Which destination were you lookin to book
What are the options cabo Cancun?
yea and Punta Cana. thats where ill be
ill send a few options, how many ppl in your group so far?
We have 6 so far could be 8
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
okay bet yea I'm familiar. will def hook it up for y'all
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
I mean soon we are just trying to weigh out all of our options
I feel that, got you. have you gotten to look at anything else yet
Can you send over the different options when you get a chance?
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
sent that email over did it come through?
Yea we like punta Cana. When it says 4 to a room would it be 1 bed 2 couches?
2 beds 2 couches for the Occidental Punta Cana package
Ok where would the most fun be or other college kids going
A lot of college kids signed up?
Ok that's where we are looking what does the party pass do for us

party pass is for off resort events. gets you round trip transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our nightclub hosted events. venues are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca Nightclub
Ok and would we have to pay in full right now? Since it's later
party pass you can add later on
for the trip its a $200 deposit, then remainder two weeks from now
gives you a little time to spread things out
Ok we think this is gonna happen do you think we could hop on like a phone call to just go over logistics and questions
yea thats fine bro. its a little late where I'm at but I'm down
Nah we don have to do it right now
Either tomorrow or Saturday whenever you can
All good I'm down for tn or tomorrow
I mean if you wanted to do it tonight we can
Bet call me whenever u ready
word will be an 888 # just a heads up
yooo T whats good bro. we all good for this weekend?
yerr whats good bro, how things lookin?
Pretty good might get delayed a day or two just trying to figure out who's going is there a deadline to get us signed up?
So not really a set date but when it sells out it sells out lol. happens randomly
everyones been locking theirs and I cant see the full inventory so the sooner the better
Ok we are aiming to get it done by Monday or Tuesday
yo T whats the good word how we lookin!
How's it looking we are hoping to get it done by tomorrow night or Wednesday morning
yoyo! bet that I'll set it up for you tomorrow am
yoyo! bout to send this over. hows the group lookin
It's good I think Tomorrow we are locked
yerr whats good bro, how we lookin?
We have practice soon we are doing it tonight
aight bet hmu after practice and I'll get the reservation started and send over for y'all
We were thinking of starting the process what does that look like
yoyo! so next step I set up the reservation for the group, just let me know if we want to do a 4 night or 5 night stay. 4 night is cheapest, but 5 night is the sweet spot
after that I'll send the reservation over, you send it to the group, each of you hop into an empty slot, ad your details, and make your deposit to secure. and then youre all good!
final balance isnt due til 2 weeks from now. so you get some time to gather yourself after the deposit. everyone gets their own slot and makes their own payments
Ok we have 7 for the 5 night
wordd. so itll be one room of 4 and one room of 3. gonna set that up rn and send over
Ok how long do we have to pay. So say if you send over the portal could we put the deposit in tomorrow and if your available tomorrow to help us
yea you can put the deposit down tomorrow, I'll add that in there. and yea down for a call tomorrow to walk through it with y'all. or whatever you need
Ok sounds good can we hop on a call at 1030 pm tomorrow to finalize everything and pay confirm we have everyone so we will 100% put our deposit down
Lmk when the portal link is headed over
I mean the earlier the better for sure, but can make 1030pm work. if we can swing any earlier let me know
sending this in a few mins will be through email
Yea sorry we have a game so we will all be together after
Ok lmk when it's through appreciate it
im gonna wait til after 1030 rn because it deactivates with 24 hours of inactivity
just sent that over. when you get onto the res you'll see I added a discount for the 3 person room price. its $829 but I got it down to the $799 price. same as the 4 person room
so that all 7 of you pay the same price
Awesome I just got it thank you we will get it locked in tmr
What info do we need so we are prepared tmr
Just all your own details, name address etc etc. Emergency contact if you want to list it. super easy takes like 2 mins to fill out
there is a section that asks for passport info, but it can be skipped for now if you dont have your passports yet or dont have it on hand
Can you call me whenever you got a chance
Would be in like 25 if that's cool
6 of us paid can 1 paid tomorrow or does it need to be tonight?
morning bro. looks like Carter and John havent gotten theirs in. can we have them get it in asap if possible. I just put a note into operations team so that they don't get cleared
Yea and it should be Ezra right
We will have them do it right now
Carter just paid jj is about too
okay bet, keep me posted if jj needs any help
Can you check to Make sure?
I'm trying to put in my flights but they are with 2 different Airlines so there's different confirmation codes and it's not allowing me to separate the flights
Is it letting you put the information in for the return flight?
Not the code but just like the time and airline
Bet and we have a ride coming to get us
You're going to be at the occidental as well right?
Yea fam I'm there every year
Everyone paid in full can you see if Ezra is good?
yo T! mind telling Carter to add flight info to his account
yoyo is Carter on the same flight as anyone else? he hasnt added it in yet
I told him too I'll tell him again
word he on the same flight as you?
bet just added that in for him
were y'all thinkin about adding any of the party passes on or nah
Do we have to put our passport info int go blue?
yea I would add passport info to your account yup
yooooo I get there Fri broo
